meaning: adj.富有旅行经验的,旅客多的,旅客使用的,旅客常到的
examples: He was a very wealthy man who had traveled the world.
We traveled by train, not by bus.
He put his share into T bills, practiced jazz piano and traveled in China.
The duo traveled the country in a non-air-conditioned pickup truck in sweltering heat doing interior jobs.
